description: Exported representation of the ticket automation pipeline graph. This is the 'equivalent' export requested in the assignment since the implementation is a Python/LangGraph application rather than an n8n workflow.

nodes.description: Sends the raw email (subject, body, sender, timestamp) to the LLM using SYSTEM_PROMPT + ANALYSIS_PROMPT_TEMPLATE from prompts.py. Retries up to LLM_MAX_RETRIES times with exponential backoff on failure. Produces a structured analysis dict (or an empty dict + logged error on failure).

Normalizes AI output: maps category/priority/sentiment to allowed enums, deduplicates tags, validates the sender email, blends AI priority with deterministic business rules (priority_from_rules), and assembles the full ticket record.
Searches recent open tickets from the same sender/category for a highly similar issue_summary (fuzzy match, rapidfuzz). If found, sets ticket.duplicate_of to the earlier ticket_id.
Inserts the ticket into the local SQLite 'tickets' table and writes a 'create' entry to 'audit_log'.
If Airtable credentials are configured, creates a mirrored record in the configured Airtable base/table and stores the returned record id back on the local ticket row.
Builds the acknowledgement email (ticket id, summary, status, assigned team) and sends it via SMTP if AUTO_SEND_ACK is enabled and SMTP is configured.

external_triggers.name: IMAP inbox poll
external_triggers.description: fetch_unseen_emails() connects to the configured IMAP mailbox, pulls unseen messages, extracts metadata + attachments, and feeds each one into the graph above as raw_email input.

external_triggers.name: Manual entry (Streamlit UI)
external_triggers.description: Agent fills in a form (sender, subject, body, attachments) which is fed into the graph the same way an inbound email would be.

external_triggers.name: Sample data loader (Streamlit UI)
external_triggers.description: Loads bundled sample emails through the same graph, for demos/testing without a live mailbox.
